Uses of Package
com.saperion.folder

Packages that use com.saperion.folder
Package
Description
com.saperion.connector
This package contains the main classic connector classes.
com.saperion.connector.rmi
Package for connector RMI client classes.
com.saperion.folder
This package contains the classes for the folder classes.
com.saperion.rmi.common
This package contains the classes for the LARIX RMI Server.
  • Classes in com.saperion.folder used by com.saperion.connector
    Class
    Description
    FolderUpdateInfo
    Container for informational objects that describe the folders (workflow or simple) that shall be refreshed on ngclient side.
    SaFolderClass
    Folder class interface.
